title: Cuprum
description: Cuprum, also known as Cu, is a mod about improving copper by adding new features and items related to copper.
body:
**Cuprum is a mod which adds new features to copper to add new reasons to mine it and make it a more functional ore while adding features to add features that should have been in minecraft a long time ago.**

---

![3D Copper Logo :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/20lUvMca/images/a2022b8f3fa85c25683876e545eed960d81d2c39.png 'Cuprum Logo')

<details>
<summary>New Features</summary>

- Added Rose Gold: A new material crafted out of gold and copper which can be crafted into a new set of tools and armor in between the iron and diamond tier.

---

- Added Copper Horns: Along with a new feature which lets you play Copper Horns and Goat Horns inside Dispensers. You can add multiple Dispensers to increase the volume of the Goat

---

- New Copper Building Blocks: Added new Copper building blocks named "Vertical Cut Copper", "Chiseled Copper", "Smooth Copper", "Edgy Copper" and changed the texture of Cut Copper to look better.

---

- Copper Wrench: Added an item which rotates blocks that can be rotated. Can also be used inside the dispenser.

---

- Copper Oxide: Added an item which you can right click on a Copper Block to oxidize it. You can obtain this by scraping the oxidization off of a Copper Block

---

- Levitator: Levitator is a new Block which gives you the levitation effect. The effect changes depending on what level of oxidization the block has.

---

- Faster Oxidization: You can now put Copper Blocks underwater to oxidize them faster.

---

- Copper Lamps: New building blocks which can be lit with redstone signals.

---

</details>

**This mod is still in development and will get future updates, so if you want to support me you can go to my ko-fi or if you want to give me new ideas, you can go to my discord.**

**FAQ**
<details>
<summary>Forge?</summary>
One day maybe... (Not planned but if you want to port it yourself let me know :D)
</details>

<details>
<summary>I wanna contribute to the mod...</summary>
Join the discord and let me know! :D (even new ideas are welcomed!)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Can you port to this version...</summary>
Currently planning to port to 1.19.2 but other than that don't expect the mod to port to older versions, mainly later updates will be supported. (But if you want to port it yourself let me know :D)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Hint to the next update ;)</summary>
"Lectricus" :)
</details>

**Credits to:
[Sn0wix](https://ko-fi.com/sn0wix) for helping me out with the mod in general.
Neuromancer for making most of the textures.
Return Copper Horns for the recipe code of the Copper Horns.**
